sql_array: CREATE TABLE server_stats (id UInt32, server_name String, uptime_value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE metrics (server_id UInt32, last_accessed DateTime, active_requests UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY server_id;
INSERT INTO metrics VALUES (1, now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR, 3), (2, now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, 5), (3, now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE, 1);

SELECT server_name, uptime() as Uptime, active_requests FROM server_stats JOIN metrics ON server_stats.id = metrics.server_id WHERE uptime() = ANY (SELECT uptime_value FROM server_stats) AND active_requests > 2 ORDER BY active_requests DESC;
SELECT server_name, COUNT(*) as RequestCount, AVG(uptime()) as AvgUptime FROM server_stats JOIN metrics ON server_stats.id = metrics.server_id GROUP BY server_name HAVING AVG(uptime()) < 5000;

SELECT last_accessed, uptime() as Uptime FROM metrics WHERE server_id = (SELECT id FROM server_stats WHERE uptime_value = ANY (SELECT uptime_value FROM server_stats WHERE server_name LIKE '%Server%')) AND last_accessed IS NOT NULL ORDER BY last_accessed;
SELECT uptime_value, server_name FROM server_stats WHERE uptime_value > 0 AND server_name IN (SELECT server_name FROM server_stats WHERE uptime_value < 5000) ORDER BY uptime_value ASC;
SELECT server_name, uptime() as Uptime FROM server_stats WHERE uptime() IS NOT NULL AND uptime() = ANY (SELECT MAX(uptime_value) FROM server_stats) GROUP BY server_name HAVING Uptime > 3000;
CREATE TABLE temp_logs (log_id UInt32, message String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_logs VALUES (1, 'Uptime Check', now()), (2, 'Request Handling', now()), (3, 'Service Restart', now());
SELECT COUNT(*) as TotalLogs, uptime() as Uptime FROM temp_logs WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND log_id = ANY (SELECT log_id FROM temp_logs);
ALTER TABLE server_stats ADD COLUMN status String DEFAULT 'active';
